# Module 4: Data Manipulation {.unnumbered}

This module covers the core data manipulation operations you'll use in nearly every analysis: creating and transforming columns, aggregating data across groups, and combining multiple tables with joins. By the end of Week 4, you'll be able to go from a raw table to a meaningful summary in a few lines of pandas code.

## Learning Objectives {.unnumbered}

By the end of this module, you will:

- Create and modify columns using assignment, arithmetic, and string operations
- Summarize data using `.groupby()` and `.agg()` with multiple aggregation functions
- Join two DataFrames on a key column using `pd.merge()`
- Choose the correct join type (inner, left, right, outer) for a given analytical need

## Module Resources {.unnumbered}

### Lecture {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 📊 Week 4 Slides | [View slides](../slides/week-04.html){target="_blank"} |
| 💻 Tuesday Your Turn Notebook | *Coming soon* |

### Chapters & Notebooks {.unnumbered}

| Chapter | Topic | Colab Notebook |
|---------|-------|---------------|
| 10 | Manipulating Data | *Coming soon* |
| 11 | Aggregating Data | *Coming soon* |
| 12 | Joining Data | *Coming soon* |

### Lab {.unnumbered}

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| 🧪 Lab 4 | *Coming soon* |
